---
pagetitle: "Musical Homeostasis v.2"
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

```{=html}
<iframe
  src="musical_homeostasis_v2_simplified_app.html"
  title="Musical Homeostasis v.2: Distributed Tuning"
  style="width: 100%; height: 1620px; border: 0; border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden;"
  loading="lazy">
</iframe>
```
